title: light, fresh Australian myeolchi-anchovies Grill
description: A light and refreshing dish that showcases the delicate flavor of myeolchi-anchovies, perfect for a cozy Australian evening.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium heat, ensuring the grates are clean and brushed with olive oil.
Rinse the myeolchi-anchovies under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the myeolchi-anchovies to the marinade and toss to coat.
Thread the myeolchi-anchovies onto skewers, leaving a small space between each fish.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
Remove the myeolchi-anchovies from the grill and serve immediately.
Garnish with chopped parsley and a sprig of Australian bush herbs, if desired.
Serve with grilled bread and a dollop of Australian bush tomato sauce, if desired.
